    N

    network.ike.extension - package network.ike.extension
     

    S

    SubprojectPruneTransformer - Class in network.ike.extension
    Maven 4 build extension that prunes a workspace POM's <subprojects> and file-activated profiles whose targets are missing from disk, before Maven's model validator gets a chance to fail on "Child subproject X does not exist".
    SubprojectPruneTransformer() - Constructor for class network.ike.extension.SubprojectPruneTransformer
    Creates the transformer.

    T

    transformFileModel(Model) - Method in class network.ike.extension.SubprojectPruneTransformer
    Prune missing subprojects and missing-target profiles from the file-stage model.
